---
title: "Backtest Comparison"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn
from thirteen_f.dashboard.charts import cumulative_curve, drawdown_chart
from thirteen_f.dashboard.tables import backtest_curves_df, backtest_metrics_df

conn = get_conn()
metrics = backtest_metrics_df(conn)
metrics
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
run_ids = metrics["run_id"].tolist()[:6]
curves = backtest_curves_df(conn, run_ids)
cumulative_curve(curves)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
drawdown_chart(curves)
```
